name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: College Park, GA's TitleMax Title Pawns at 5420 Old National Hwy provides quick title loans and pawn services during convenient business hours.
description_long:
Located at 5420 Old National Hwy in College Park, GA, this TitleMax Title Pawns store operates as a standalone pawn shop serving the College Park community. The location is conveniently accessible to residents throughout the area and maintains regular business hours Monday through Friday from 10AM to 7PM, with Saturday service from 10AM to 4PM. Sunday hours are closed, so plan your visit accordingly.

This College Park location specializes in quick title loans and pawn services. Whether you need immediate cash or want to pawn jewelry, electronics, or other valuables, the knowledgeable staff at this location can assist you. For specific questions about rates, required documentation, or current availability, call +1 404-761-1174 to speak with team members directly.

Residents of College Park, GA looking for fast title loans or pawn services should bring a valid photo ID, proof of vehicle ownership if applying for a title loan, and your vehicle keys. Title loan approvals can happen quickly at this location, making it a practical option for those needing emergency funds. The store is designed to process transactions efficiently for College Park customers.
address: 5420 Old National Hwy, College Park, GA 30349

company_info.headquarters: 5420 Old National Hwy, College Park, GA 30349

pros: Most credit types accepted despite a credit check being performed
Fully online application and smartphone-based vehicle appraisal — no in-store visit required until signing
Borrower keeps driving their vehicle throughout the pawn period
Instant eligibility estimate shown before visiting a store
Store open since July 2004 with established local presence in Atlanta
5.00/5 average rating from 465+ Google reviews at this location
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment terms disclosed on the store page — cost is opaque until you apply
Vehicle repossession risk if unable to repay — collateral is your car
Not available to active-duty military members, their spouses, or dependents
Store is not bilingual — explicitly listed as 'No' on the location page
Sunday closure and limited Saturday hours (10am–4pm) restrict access on weekends
best_for: Car owners with a clear, lien-free vehicle title who need fast cash
Borrowers with poor or damaged credit who have been turned down for traditional loans
Atlanta-area residents facing a short-term cash emergency who can repay quickly
People who need same-day funding and cannot wait for a bank or credit union approval
diagnosis: TitleMax title pawns are designed for car owners with a clear vehicle title who need fast cash and cannot qualify for conventional credit. The product is expensive short-term debt — APR is not disclosed upfront — and carries real risk of vehicle loss if the pawn is not repaid, making it a genuine last-resort option rather than a routine borrowing tool.
services: Online customer portal for loan management
meta_description: TitleMax Title Pawns at 5420 Old National Hwy, College Park, GA. Quick title loans and pawn services for fast cash.
